title: Amtech F0720 Drywall Screwdriver Bits, 10pc Hex Shank, Phillips 2, 65mm
features: ENSURE ACCURACY: These drywall screw adaptors are designed to correctly countersinks drywall screw heads in plasterboard and plywood
DURABLE: They have a sand blaster CRV steel construction for durability
INCLUDES: The set includes 10 x 65mm x Phillips 2 adaptors and a Hex female head
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description The Amtech F0720 Drywall Screwdriver Bits essentially gives you the best option and support when you need to screw into drywall. The depth is to stop eliminate damage to the plasterboard you are working on and they also prevent screws from going to deep into the boards. A toolbox must have. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
